_meta.purpose: Vikriti (current imbalance) assessment — asks about the last 2-4 weeks only, not constitutional nature. Results indicate which dosha is currently elevated and needs balancing attention.

sections.title: Your Current State
sections.description: Answer based on how you have felt in the last 2–4 weeks — not your lifelong tendencies

questions.text: How has your digestion been in the last 2–4 weeks?
questions.hint: Focus on recent changes — not how your digestion usually is

options.text: Irregular or erratic — constipation, bloating, dryness, or gas has crept in more than usual
Acidic or inflamed — heartburn, loose stools, or a burning feeling in the gut
Sluggish and heavy — food feels like it is sitting, slow movement, congestion or mucus

questions.text: How has your sleep been lately?
questions.hint: Think about the last few weeks specifically

options.text: Disrupted or anxious — light sleep, racing thoughts, waking at odd hours, vivid or disturbing dreams
Short and driven — I push late into the night, overactive mind even when tired, waking feeling alert but depleted
Excessive but unrefreshing — sleeping more than usual, heavy upon waking, hard to drag myself out of bed

questions.text: What best describes your emotional state right now?
questions.hint: Be honest about how you have actually been feeling this past month

options.text: Anxious and scattered — worry, overthinking, or feeling ungrounded and overwhelmed
Irritable and pressured — frustration, impatience, or a sense of burnout building beneath the surface
Low and withdrawn — low motivation, emotional flatness, heaviness, or retreating from people and responsibilities

questions.text: How has your energy been lately?
questions.hint: Day-to-day energy levels over the past few weeks

options.text: Erratic — bursts of energy followed by sudden crashes, difficult to sustain effort through the day
Intense but inflammatory — pushing hard but feeling overheated, tense, or like I am running on fumes
Flat and heavy — hard to get motivated or started, persistent fatigue, or a general feeling of inertia

questions.text: Which physical symptoms have you noticed most in the last few weeks?
questions.hint: Select the group that resonates most — you may notice some from each

options.text: Dry skin or lips, cracking joints, bloating or gas, cold hands and feet, or difficulty staying warm
Skin rashes or acne flares, acidity or reflux, inflammation or soreness, feeling overheated or irritated skin
Nasal congestion or mucus, puffiness or water retention, unexplained weight gain, or a foggy heavy-headed feeling
